paper_title: Dental Morphology and Measurements of Megacricetodon Species

methods.description: Process for imaging and measuring teeth and mandibles using microscopy and calipers to record precise dimensions for morphological analysis.

steps.description: Teeth and mandibles were imaged and measured using a Nikon SMZ 8 microscope set at 20 X magnifications, and measurements were recorded to the nearest 0.01 mm.
steps.searchable_summary: Capture images and measure teeth using a Nikon SMZ 8 microscope at 20X magnification

steps.description: The SEM photographs of some teeth were taken from uncoated specimens using a Hitachi scanning electron microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: Capture SEM photographs of uncoated teeth specimens using a Hitachi SEM

steps.description: All postcranial measurements were taken to 0.05 mm using digital calipers.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure postcranial elements using digital calipers to 0.05 mm precision
